title: The Secret Behind the Southern Pinwheel Galaxy

scenes.text: What if you could capture stunning images of a galaxy from your backyard?
The Southern Pinwheel Galaxy is only about 15 million light-years away from Earth.
It's one of the closest spiral galaxies, making it a favorite for amateur astronomers.
All you need is a telescope and clear skies to glimpse this beauty!
scenes.label: EASY TO SPOT!

scenes.text: Follow to feed your curious mind daily.

description: With a telescope, you can capture breathtaking images of the Southern Pinwheel Galaxy from your yard. Follow for daily science!
